name: cloud
description: /cloud <args> — wraps `hexa cloud` (runpod dispatch · canonical subcommand form, structured argv — never raw ssh/scp per commons g8). Subverbs: run · nohup · poll · copy-to · copy-from. NL trigger via skill ('runpod dispatch', 'GPU pod 에 돌려', 'pod 결과 가져와'). Pairs with commons g8 + g12.
